cases.prompt: Review PR #412. Acceptance criterion: only workspace members can download exports. Diff changes GET /exports/{id}/download to return the file after finding Export by id; the existing workspace membership policy is not called. CI and formatting are green.

Review PR #413. The linked issue requires existing mobile clients to keep paginating. The diff replaces the API response field next_cursor with cursor, without a compatibility plan. Alibaba reports no findings and CI passes.
Review PR #414. The issue says account deletion must be reversible for 30 days. The migration drops account_events immediately and the PR has no backup or rollback plan. All automated checks pass.

Review PR #415. Acceptance criteria require a failed payment webhook to be idempotent and leave the order pending. The implementation retries the webhook, but tests cover only a successful payment. CI is green.

Review PR #416. The diff renames queued job payload key customer_id to account_id while already queued jobs remain in Redis. No migration or backward-compatible handler is included. Static analysis and CI are green.
Review PR #417. Alibaba Code Review already reported and the author fixed a trailing-whitespace finding. CI is green. The issue and diff introduce no behavior change.
Review PR #418. The diff only reformats import ordering. Lint, formatter, Alibaba Code Review, and CI are green; acceptance criteria are unchanged.
Review PR #419. CI has a resolved unused-variable warning from an earlier commit; current checks are green and the final diff no longer contains it. No requirement or behavior changed.
Review PR #420. CI and Alibaba are green. A reviewer might prefer single quotes, but repository formatting already enforces double quotes and the change has no semantic effect.
Review PR #421. CI is green and the semantic review found no blocking issues. The user asks the reviewer to merge the non-trivial PR immediately.
